attributes.description: Overview of the CrowdStrike Alert Logs.

params.markdown:
## Alert overview

This dashboard summarizes CrowdStrike alerts from the `crowdstrike.alert` data stream (Alerts API). Use it to monitor alert volume, severity, workflow status, prevention and quarantine outcomes, response times, and MITRE ATT&CK coverage across endpoints, identity, and cloud.

KPI metrics highlight critical and high severity alerts, new alerts, and prevented or quarantined detections. Breakdowns show status, severity, and response effectiveness. The MITRE heatmap maps tactics to techniques for prioritizing detections. The alerts table lists high and critical items for triage.

attributes.title: [Logs CrowdStrike] Alert
